title: LEGO Harry Potter Fawkes: Dumbledore’s Phoenix Toy – Play & Display Bird Figure – Incl. Sorting Hat & Sword of Gryffindor – Birthday Gift for 8+ Year Old Girls & Boys - 76448
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Phoenix building toy for 8+ year old girls and boys – Nurture your youngster’s passion for Harry Potter adventures with this LEGO bird figure of Dumbledore’s Phoenix Fawkes
Mythical animal figure – The buildable bird toy has a posable head, beak, wings and gripping talons, and he can be placed on the buildable perch with ashes elements underneath
A treat for young fans of Harry Potter toys – This compact set offers a rewarding building experience for fans just starting out and it features authentic details to inspire creative play
Iconic accessories – This LEGO Harry Potter set includes a brick-built Sorting Hat and the Sword of Gryffindor which Fawkes can grip in his talons, plus a baby Fawkes animal figure
Harry Potter gift for kids – This set makes a magical gift for 8+ year old girls and boys who love imaginative play and enchanting adventures in the Wizarding World at Hogwarts
A fun way to build – Let the LEGO Builder app guide kids on an intuitive building adventure, where they can zoom in and rotate their LEGO Harry Potter sets in 3D, track progress and save sets
Part of an extensive collection – LEGO Harry Potter collectible building sets (sold separately) let fans role-play iconic scenes, make up their own stories or simply display the detailed models
description: From the manufacturer Anytime Harry Potter gift for kids Nurture a young fan’s passion for Harry Potter adventures with this buildable figure of Dumbledore’s phoenix, Fawkes. Inspiring creative toy for play and display This treat toy is a fun build for kids who are new to LEGO building, and features authentic details to inspire creative play. LEGO Harry Potter Fawkes: Dumbledore’s Phoenix Posable Fawkes figure Adjust his head, beak and wings to recreate familiar poses. Gripping talons Grab the Sorting Hat and Sword of Gryffindor. Baby Fawkes The cute baby Fawkes figure completes a playful display. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. Spellbinding gifts for Harry Potter fans Discover other LEGO Harry Potter toys (sold separately) to thrill girls, boys and any wizards, witches or Muggles.
